ASR Tactical 3000 Lumen 5-Stage Rechargeable Flashlight with Adjustable Beam

Equip yourself with the ultimate tactical flashlight designed for performance, durability and versatility in any situation. Delivering an impressive 3000 lumens and a beam distance of up to 3300 feet, this rechargeable flashlight ensures maximum visibility.

Key Features

  • 3000 LUMEN TACTICAL FLASHLIGHT: Delivering an impressive 3000 lumens and a beam distance of up to 3300 feet for maximum visibility in any environment
  • FIVE LIGHTING MODES: High, Medium, Low, Strobe, and SOS settings offer customizable brightness and signaling options for every scenario; High mode runs for 3 hours, Medium for 5 hours, Low for 10 hours, and both Strobe & SOS modes for 4 hours each
  • RECHARGEABLE BATTERY: Built-in 2600 mAh battery with USB-C input for fast charging and USB-A output to charge phones or other devices; LED lights display remaining power at a glance so you’re never left in the dark
  • ADJUSTABLE BEAM FOCUS: Push pull head design lets you easily switch between a focused spotlight and broad floodlight for ample lighting options
  • PORTABLE DESIGN: Measuring 7.5 inches long, with a secure lanyard and lightweight build, this tactical flashlight is perfect for including with tactical gear, bug out bags, camping accessories, survival kits and more

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRT-OCHAI3LG
  • UPC: 810131702281
  • Color: Black

With five tactical lighting modes (High, Medium, Low, Strobe, and SOS), you can quickly adapt to changing environments, whether you’re navigating dark terrain, signaling for assistance, or maintaining a low light presence. The adjustable beam allows for rapid transitions between a focused spotlight for long distance visibility, and a wide floodlight for broader coverage.

Built with a 2600 mAh rechargeable battery, USB-C input for fast charging, and USB-A output to power your essential devices, this flashlight doubles as a critical emergency tool. Battery indicator lights keep you ready, while the compact 7.5-inch design, secure lanyard, and rugged black finish make it easy to carry, deploy, and store with the rest of your tactical gear. Perfect for operations, emergency kits, and outdoor preparedness, this flashlight delivers reliable performance when it matters most.
